compressed_prompt: Write me a template for a product description in the form of a poem and end it with a post script starting with P.P.S
response:
Here is a template for a product description in the form of a poem:

---

# [Product Name] - A Poem

Introducing [product name], a wonder to behold,
A [product category] with a story to be told,
With [key feature 1] and [key feature 2] so bright,
It fills your [need/problem it solves] with pure delight.

Crafted with [material/ingredient] of the finest kind,
A [adjective] solution you will surely find,
In [color/size/variety options] to suit your every need,
[Product name] is truly guaranteed to succeed.

For [target audience] who deserve the very best,
This [product category] will stand above the rest,
At [price point] it is a worthy buy,
A [adjective] investment you cannot deny.

So order now and feel the difference today,
Let [product name] brighten up your day,
With [unique selling point] like no other brand,
The finest [product category] in all the land.

*Available at [website/store location]*
*[Call to action - e.g., Shop Now / Order Today]*

---

> **P.P.S** - Don't forget to take advantage of our
> [special offer/discount/promotion] for a limited
> time only! [Details of offer here]
